about.title: About Me
about.bio1: I'm a passionate information systems engineer with a strong background in data analysis and software development. I enjoy turning complex data into actionable insights and building tools that make a difference.
about.bio2: When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, reading about anything, or playing videogames and board games.

pneumoniaCNN.title: Pneumonia Detection using CNNs
pneumoniaCNN.description: A Deep Learning project focused on healthcare, designed to automate the detection of pneumonia from chest X-ray images using Convolutional Neural Network (CNN).

retailClustering.title: Customer Segmentation using Clustering
retailClustering.description: A Machine Learning and Business Analytics project designed to segment retail customers based on their purchasing behavior using clustering and unsupervised learning techniques.

chatbotCNRT.title: AI Agent and Chatbot for CNRT
chatbotCNRT.description: Design and implementation of an intelligent chatbot system powered by Generative Artificial Intelligence for the CNRT (National Commission for Transport Regulation).

iterolingua.title: IteroLingua
iterolingua.description: IteroLingua is a spaced-repetition flashcard app for language learners. Add words, get AI-generated definitions via Google Gemini, and review them on an SM-2 schedule that optimizes retention.

job1.description: I designed and implemented an intelligent chatbot system for the CNRT (National Commission for Transport Regulation). I was responsible for the backend development and the LLM-based agent architecture, leading the ingestion process of complex regulatory standards using RAG techniques to ensure accurate and contextual responses. Through strategic prompt engineering, I optimized the virtual assistant's decision-making capabilities. This resulted in the successful deployment of a multichannel solution integrated into both Telegram and web platforms via web components, successfully advancing the system to its technical validation phase.

job2.description: I transform complex data into strategic business assets. My expertise covers the entire data lifecycle: from advanced extraction and manipulation using SQL and Python, to the cleaning and modeling of corporate databases. I leverage Looker Studio to build intuitive dashboards that enable clients to visualize key trends and optimize their operations through precise, real-time insights.

item1.title: Information Systems Engineer
item1.description: I completed my engineering studies, achieving the institution's highest GPA of 9.33. My final graduation project was TrashUp, a smart mobile recycling platform that uses Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to classify waste in real-time and incorporates gamification mechanics to promote environmental awareness.

item2.title: Interview with La Gaceta
item2.description: Selected by La Gaceta—the most influential local media outlet—for a special interview as one of the top students in the province, in recognition of academic merit and for ranking 1st in my university class.

item3.title: Top GPA and Class Flag Bearer at UTN FRT
item3.description: Graduated with a cumulative GPA of 9.20/10, ranking 1st at Universidad Tecnológica Nacional - Facultad Regional Tucumán. Selected as the Class Flag Bearer (Abanderado), the university’s highest distinction for academic merit and leadership. This achievement reflects my commitment to excellence, meticulous attention to detail, and a strong analytical mindset—qualities I now leverage to transform raw data into high-impact business insights.

item4.title: Speaker at CONAISII
item4.description: CONAISII is a prestigious conference that brings together innovative student projects from across Argentina. My team and I were selected among the top six student projects to speak at the event. We presented on operational research applied to server resource planning and management for student university enrollment. Our findings have potential applications to improve the efficiency of university administrative systems.

item5.title: Started My University Studies
item5.description: I began my journey in Information Systems Engineering at UTN FRT, focusing ever since on building efficient and innovative technological solutions.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, opportunities, or collaborations. Feel free to reach out!

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Thoughts on software engineering, data analysis, and technology.
